title: Appraise and purchase used motor vehicles for sale
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Appraise and purchase used motor vehicles for sale demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Inspect used motor vehicle

pcs.text: Used motor vehicle is selected for inspection using workplace selection criteria 1.2 Vehicle is inspected and appraised according to workplace procedures1.3 Information collected from vehicle appraisal process is matched with information available in pricing guides
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Used motor vehicle is selected for inspection using workplace selection criteria 1.2 Vehicle is inspected and appraised according to workplace procedures1.3 Information collected from vehicle appraisal process is matched with information available in pricing guides?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Used motor vehicle is selected for inspection using workplace selection criteria 1.2 Vehicle is inspected and appraised according to workplace procedures1.3 Information collected from vehicle appraisal process is matched with information available in pricing guides.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Inspect used motor vehicle

elements.title: Value vehicle

pcs.text: Collected information is analysed to determine vehicle value2.2 Requirement for vehicle is determined on the basis of any analysis of workplace records and stock requirements2.3 Issues and concerns about the used motor vehicle are discussed with experienced team members and supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collected information is analysed to determine vehicle value2.2 Requirement for vehicle is determined on the basis of any analysis of workplace records and stock requirements2.3 Issues and concerns about the used motor vehicle are discussed with experienced team members and supervisor?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Value vehicle

elements.title: Negotiate vehicle purchase price

pcs.text: Vehicle is appraised based on information collected and appraisal is discussed with owner3.2 Satisfactory purchase price is negotiated with owner using key points identified in appraisal as negotiating points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Vehicle is appraised based on information collected and appraisal is discussed with owner3.2 Satisfactory purchase price is negotiated with owner using key points identified in appraisal as negotiating points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Vehicle is appraised based on information collected and appraisal is discussed with owner3.2 Satisfactory purchase price is negotiated with owner using key points identified in appraisal as negotiating points.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Negotiate vehicle purchase price

elements.title: Purchase vehicle and finalise purchase process

pcs.text: Used vehicle is purchased according to workplace budget and procedures4.2 Purchase process and required documentation are completed according to workplace procedures and legislative and statutory requirements4.3 Workplace records are updated to reflect vehicles purchased
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Used vehicle is purchased according to workplace budget and procedures4.2 Purchase process and required documentation are completed according to workplace procedures and legislative and statutory requirements4.3 Workplace records are updated to reflect vehicles purchased?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Used vehicle is purchased according to workplace budget and procedures4.2 Purchase process and required documentation are completed according to workplace procedures and legislative and statutory requirements4.3 Workplace records are updated to reflect vehicles purchased.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Purchase vehicle and finalise purchase process
